description: You are a Lighting Designer at an MEP consultancy. The architectural shell of the FZK-Haus residential building is pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). A project brief is available on the workstation desktop — locate and review it to understand the lighting requirements. Using Bonsai, model at least 5 light fixtures inside the building. Classify them specifically as `IfcLightFixture` entities. Ensure all fixtures are explicitly assigned to a building storey (e.g., Ground Floor or Upper Floor) for proper spatial containment. Additionally, create and assign a property set to these fixtures containing at least one domain-specific property such as 'Wattage', 'LuminousFlux', 'Voltage', or 'LightColor'. Once complete, save the enriched IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_lighting.ifc.
